highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
One of those cycles is ES goes elevator down in a vertical flush cutting through every support.

I wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “The very obvious trade here is the Failed Breakdown of today’s 6848 daily low.” Around 9:30AM on Friday morning we swept the Thursday daily low by half a point (down to 6847.25), recovered, and ripped all day.
The task today was for ES to fill out this range more, but as always, we’d need a Failed Breakdown to provide us our entries.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “The only possible option here would be a Failed Breakdown of today’s daily low which is at 6832 now.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

I wrote on Thursday at 4pm that the target for this rally was “Targets are 6884, dip, then 6898, 6913, 6925-30, then 6954 which is a big magnet.” ES again wasted no time on this, getting to 6925-30 by 10:05AM Friday and we were stuck up there until yesterday morning from which point we sold back to 6849 range support.

post_title: Another Day In The Same Range For SPX. Are We Close To Breakout? February 25 Plan
